name: Lab CC-101: Claude Code First Session
postCreateCommand: echo 'export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=lab-ai-coding-2026' >> ~/.bashrc && echo 'export ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=https://litellm-anthropic-proxy-production.up.railway.app' >> ~/.bashrc && echo '{"hasCompletedOnboarding":true,"numStartups":3,"installMethod":"global","oauthAccount":null,"primaryApiKey":"lab-ai-coding-2026"}' > ~/.claude.json && mkdir -p ~/.claude && echo '{"env":{"ANTHROPIC_API_KEY":"lab-ai-coding-2026","ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL":"https://litellm-anthropic-proxy-production.up.railway.app"}}' > ~/.claude/settings.json
